scope: all 43 routed-expert layers, cold base-pack rebuild, health hold and guarded cleanup
trace_sanitization: Epoch and absolute cumulative vmstat counters were removed; swap and OOM counters are expressed as deltas from sample 1.
relationship_to_final_patch: The canonical final patch retains this lazy one-layer staging and fail-closed cache-control implementation; exact-head store, MXFP4, cgroup, baked-image, checkpoint-residency, next-shard retry, and constrained-pack probes are recorded separately.
